title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners
company: Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners:
Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners!
